expectations.text: Describes creating the child issue first and then linking it to the parent issue
expectations.evidence: Response describes create-first, link-second child issue flow.

expectations.text: Mentions resolving parent and child issue node IDs before linking
expectations.evidence: Response mentions resolving parent/child node IDs.

expectations.text: Includes or clearly describes the `gh api graphql` `addSubIssue` mutation
expectations.evidence: Response includes/describes the addSubIssue GraphQL mutation.

expectations.text: States that a plain `Parent: #N` body reference is only a fallback when GitHub sub-issues are unavailable
expectations.evidence: Response treats plain parent-body references as fallback-only.
